texto: The world is vast, its huge and you never know where your perfect or even comforting mate lies in this ocean of emotions and mixed world, hence one needs to explore and explore in the wild, giving it all to their fate, who knows whom we come cross, maybe 7 seven seas across who clicks us perfectly, even more perfectly than the person sitting next to you.
explicacao: Citação de Meeran W. Malik sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The world is vast, its huge and you never know where your perfect or even comforting mate lies in…” articula amizade, companion, distance em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como distance e explore.
